title: ProviderModelCatalogPosture
description: Broker-projected provider model-catalog posture where manual allowlist remains canonical and discovery/probes remain advisory.

selection_authority.description: Model selection authority stays with manually managed allowlisted_model_ids.

discovery_posture.description: Provider discovery output is advisory only and cannot authorize models.

compatibility_probe_posture.description: Compatibility probe output is advisory only and cannot mutate authorization state.

discovered_model_ids.description: Advisory provider-discovered model IDs for operator visibility; not authoritative for authorization.

probe_compatible_model_ids.description: Advisory model IDs observed as probe-compatible; manual allowlist remains canonical.
